description: Plugin-distributed hooks for field-service-management. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags FSM anti-patterns (SLA without dispatch/skill basis, route without geo note, truck-stock without service-level note, hard-coded labor rate without date). Set FSM_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
